items.title: A clearer SJWMS Maths
items.text: The clearer visual identity now runs across KS3, GCSE, unit pages and the main learning tools.

items.title: More unit pages available
items.text: Year 7 now includes all ten units and the GCSE course includes units 1 to 19.

items.title: Accessing SPARX
items.text: New to SJWMS? Use the setup guide to get SPARX ready for homework assignments in Years 7 to 11.
